summary: Populates defaultSyncResources() with the seven Pricebook resource types (categories, equipment, materials, services, discounts-and-fees, materialsmarkup, clientspecificpricing).
reason: The v4.6.1 generator emitted an empty defaultSyncResources(), so `sync` was a no-op (#1305). Resource names match the exact strings the generated list commands use as resourceType keys.
validated_outcome: sync populates the local SQLite store; the 12 novel audit/find/dedupe commands read from it
